subject: Principle of least surprise — IETF Discussion Corpus (ietf112-ietf116)

attachments.body: {"principle_id": "least_surprise", "name": "Principle of least surprise", "description": "System should behave in ways that least surprise users and implementers.", "rfc_refs": ["RFC 3439"]}
